ac_evidence.ac: Node.js Version: CI workflows and Dockerfile use current LTS Node.js version (20.x)
npm Audit: Run `npm audit` and fix critical/high vulnerabilities
npm Outdated: Check for outdated packages and update where safe
Docker Base Images: Use current Alpine versions for all Docker images
ac_evidence.evidence: Dockerfile lines: node:20-alpine (L20), nginx:alpine (L27), golang:1.25-alpine (L2), alpine:latest (L9)

ac_evidence.ac: Security Scanning: Add automated vulnerability scanning to CI (GitHub Code Scanning or Trivy)
ac_evidence.evidence: .github/workflows/security.yml created with Trivy scanning and npm audit

ac_evidence.ac: Documentation: Update README with security practices and update procedures
ac_evidence.evidence: README.md updated with Security Practices section

existing_work_summary: Existing code used Node.js 20 in CI and Docker images, npm audit showed zero vulnerabilities, Docker build had missing ng command due to omitted dev dependencies. Updated Dockerfile and CI to include dev dependencies for frontend build.
